title: Interview Prep Course Schema
description: Defines the entire Skillon Preparation curriculum structure: the LHS Menu items and their RHS polymorphic Course Widget payloads

id.description: Unique UUID for the course instance

modules.description: The Left Hand Side (LHS) Menu Tree Nodes

title.description: LHS Menu Item Name. e.g., 'System Design'

icon.description: Lucide icon name identifier for the LHS Menu

widgets.description: The Right Hand Side (RHS) dynamic content blocks for this module

widgetType.description: The exact React Component renderer to invoke dynamically

payload.description: Polymorphic payload block containing the raw string/content data for the specific widget renderer
